results.title: Supabase
results.description: Supabase is an open-source backend platform providing a full Postgres database, authentication, storage, real-time, and edge functions to help developers build applications quickly.

results.title: Supabase
results.description: Supabase is an open-source Postgres development platform that provides a suite of tools for building applications, offering features like hosted databases, authentication, real-time APIs, functions, and file storage as an alternative to Firebase.

results.title: Supabase
results.description: Supabase is the Postgres development platform, offering features like hosted Postgres, authentication, auto-generated APIs, functions, and file storage using enterprise-grade open source tools.

results.title: Supabase
results.description: Supabase is an open-source Postgres development platform that provides all the backend features needed to build a product, including a full database, authentication, storage, real-time functionality, and edge functions.

results.title: Supabase
results.description: Supabase is an open-source platform providing a suite of backend tools for building web and mobile applications, including a PostgreSQL database, authentication, instant APIs, and storage.

results.title: Supabase UI
results.description: Supabase UI is a React UI library that provides pre-built components for building user interfaces with Supabase, including authentication features.

results.title: Supabase (llmstxt)
results.description: Supabase is an open source backend-as-a-service platform that provides a suite of tools for database, authentication, and storage needs.

results.title: Supabase UI
results.description: Supabase UI is a collection of React components and blocks built on shadcn/ui, designed to connect your front-end to your Supabase back-end with features like authentication, file uploads, and real-time functionalities.

results.title: Supabase JS
results.description: Supabase JS is an isomorphic JavaScript client for Supabase, enabling seamless interaction with your database and backend services from various JavaScript environments.

results.title: Supabase Swift
results.description: A Swift client library for interacting with Supabase, mirroring the design of supabase-js, enabling database operations, authentication, and real-time subscriptions.

results.title: Supabase Py
results.description: Python client for Supabase, enabling interaction with databases, authentication, storage, and edge functions.

results.title: Supabase CLI
results.description: The Supabase CLI is a command-line interface tool for managing Supabase projects, enabling local development, database migrations, function deployment, type generation, and authenticated API requests.

results.title: Supabase API (v1)
results.description: The Supabase API (v1) provides programmatic access to various Supabase services, including project management, authentication, database operations, and analytics, generated from an OpenAPI specification.

results.title: Y-Supabase
results.description: y-supabase is a Supabase Realtime provider for Yjs, enabling collaborative applications by syncing CRDT data through Supabase channels.

results.title: Supabase KT
results.description: A Kotlin Multiplatform client library for interacting with Supabase, offering modules for authentication, database, storage, real-time features, and functions.

results.title: Supabase Realtime
results.description: Supabase Realtime enables sending ephemeral messages, tracking shared state, and listening to Postgres changes over WebSockets using Elixir and the Phoenix Framework.

results.title: Supabase Laravel Package
results.description: A comprehensive Laravel package for integrating with Supabase services, providing access to Auth, Database, Storage, and Realtime features within Laravel applications.

results.title: Supabase RS
results.description: An unofficial, lightweight Rust SDK for interacting with Supabase's database, Auth, Realtime, and Storage, offering features like CRUD operations, advanced filtering, and GraphQL support.

results.title: Supabase Kubernetes
results.description: This repository provides Helm charts to deploy a Supabase instance on a Kubernetes cluster, offering an open-source alternative to Firebase.

results.title: Supabase Auth
results.description: Supabase Auth is a Go-based authentication and user management server that handles JWT issuance, row-level security, and various sign-in methods for Supabase projects.

results.title: Supabase Functions Py
results.description: Supabase Functions Python is a Python client library for invoking Supabase Edge Functions, enabling developers to easily integrate serverless functions into their applications.

results.title: Supabase MCP
results.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides tools for interacting with a Supabase database, enabling AI assistants to perform database operations through a standardized interface.

results.title: Supabase Python Reference
results.description: The Supabase Python client library provides an entrypoint for Python developers to interact with the Supabase ecosystem, enabling database operations like select, insert, update, delete, and remote procedure calls.

results.title: Supabase Go
results.description: An isomorphic Go client for Supabase, integrating with Postgrest, Gotrue, Supabase Storage, and Supabase Edge Functions for database access, user authentication, file storage, and serverless functions.

results.title: Nuxt Supabase
results.description: A Nuxt 3 module that integrates Supabase, providing features like authentication, composables, and isomorphic client usage for API server routes.

results.title: Supabase C#
results.description: Supabase C# is a .NET client library that integrates with Supabase services, providing features for real-time data, authentication, storage, and serverless functions.

results.title: Supabase Go
results.description: An isomorphic Go client for Supabase, integrating with Postgrest, Gotrue, Supabase Storage, and Supabase Edge Functions for database access, user authentication, file storage, and serverless functions.

results.title: Supamode
results.description: Supamode transforms your Supabase database into a CMS, allowing you to manage and extend your application's business logic.

results.title: Supabase MCP Server
results.description: An open-source MCP server for Supabase that allows IDEs to safely run SQL, manage schema changes, and interact with Supabase APIs, featuring built-in safety controls and transaction handling.

results.title: Unbody
results.description: The Supabase of AI era. A modular, open-source backend for building AI-native software — designed for knowledge, not static data.
